use_cases: Hero sections for creative portfolios with immersive scroll-driven image reveals
Product showcases where items zoom out progressively as users scroll
Storytelling landing pages with layered parallax image sequences
Photography or design portfolios with cinematic reveal effects
SaaS landing pages requiring dynamic visual engagement
ai_summary: A scroll-driven parallax zoom component using Framer Motion that creates an immersive image reveal experience. Multiple images scale from 1x to 8x as the user scrolls through a tall container, with each image having unique positioning. The sticky viewport keeps images centered while they progressively zoom out, creating a dramatic zoom-out effect commonly used in creative portfolios, product showcases, and storytelling sections.
